response.step_by_step_log: Identified two songs performed by Todoroki Hajime: 'Peter Pan' and 'Countach'. Attempted web searches for lyrics for both using the simplified query structure '[Song Title] [Performer] Japanese and English lyrics'. Results for lyrics were inconclusive or partial, providing metadata references but not full lyrics for the specified songs in the desired format, so they have been set to null.
response.global_summary: A two-song concert performance medley performed by virtual singer Todoroki Hajime, featuring a brief intermission/dialogue segment between the two songs.

scenes.description: Todoroki Hajime performing 'Peter Pan' on stage. Song title appears in the top-left corner.
Intermission segment where the performer talks to the audience.
Todoroki Hajime performing 'Countach' with backup dancers on stage. Credits for lyricist and composer appear on screen.
